# Tara Home

Tara is a preconfigured smart home kit and home automation kit for existing homes, listings, and move-in-ready upgrades.

## Core Offering

- Smart home kit and home automation kit planning
- One-bedroom starter package from $2,999
- Camera kit path from $9,999
- Local PC hub server
- Presence detection sensors
- Smart doorbell
- Door sensors and window sensors
- Smart lights
- Smart thermostat
- Phone app handoff
- Optional exterior camera kit
- No required monthly subscription for core routines

- Terms: https://tarahome.ai/terms/
